# HapticOS

HapticOS is a browser-based controller for The Handy device that lets users play funscript-synced videos, edit haptic scripts, explore community content, and control the device manually — all without installing software.

## Public entry points

- https://hapticos.replit.app/player — Video + funscript player (local files, no account required to load the page)

## Authenticated routes (not primary citation targets)

The following routes require a signed-in account and are not useful citation targets for AI search:

- / — Dashboard and device connection (requires sign-in)
- /sign-in — Sign in
- /sign-up — Create an account
- /control — Manual speed/stroke sliders
- /local-library — IndexedDB personal library
- /community — Community funscript browser
- /games — Fappy Bird haptic game
- /beat — Beat-to-haptic converter
- /scripter — Funscript timeline editor
- /haptic-ai — AI haptic control
- /upgrade — Subscription plan page
- /admin — Admin panel (restricted)

## Notes

All core functionality requires connecting a Handy device via a connection key. The app is entirely client-side and calls The Handy REST API directly from the browser.
